SPY.notes: Gap-down open on Trump Iran escalation, V-reversal attempt on Iran/Oman Hormuz diplomacy. Dow was down 600+ pts at lows, clawed back to near flat.

QQQ.notes: Tech leading down: NVDA, AMZN, META -2%+, TSLA -4% on terrible sales quarter.

IWM.notes: Giving back yesterday's +3.4% rally. Small-cap rotation reversing.

vix.notes: Opened lower (vol crush continuation from yesterday), then spiked 6% to 26.86 on Trump Iran rhetoric, now settling mid-range. March range: 20.28-35.30.

fear_greed.label: Extreme Fear
fear_greed.notes: 4th+ consecutive day in extreme fear. Hit single digits (8) on March 31. Historically powerful contrarian bullish signal but muted during active geopolitical conflict.

oil.notes: Surging on Hormuz blockade deadline April 6. Intraday range extremely wide ($97.50-$111.48). OPEC meeting April 5.

put_call_ratios.notes: Heavily bearish options positioning. OI P/C near 2.0 indicates extreme put buying.

gex_assessment.notes: SPY below gamma flip zone. Negative gamma amplifies moves both directions. Yesterday's gamma flip at 656-660 is now resistance. Dealer positioning whipsawed 3 consecutive days.

iv_regime.notes: VIX at 25.5 with oil at $105+ is unusually low given energy shock magnitude. IV should be 28-32+. Market may be complacent or data lagging.

macro.notes: Shortened week. NFP tomorrow is critical for Fed policy. Any further Trump Iran statements could whipsaw market.

sector_performance.notes: Sharp energy/tech divergence. Oil-sensitive sectors surging while growth/tech selling.

intraday_pattern.weekly_pattern: 5 weeks of Iran war: Monday strong, mid-week flat, Thursday/Friday collapse. Today is Thursday — following the pattern so far with gap-down, but attempting reversal on Oman diplomacy.
intraday_pattern.key_catalyst: Iran/Oman Strait of Hormuz shipping protocol negotiations
